June 10, 2026

Welcome to my Blog

Hello World!

This is my first blog post. I built this site using Astro and it matches the aesthetic of my portfolio.

Why Astro?

  • Fast: Ships zero JavaScript by default.
  • Flexible: Use any framework or just plain Markdown.
  • SEO Friendly: Easy to manage meta tags and structure.

Stay tuned for more updates!
